! Comment lines should be ignored.
# Hash comments should also be ignored.

# Plain AdGuard domain rule matches exact qname only.
plain-match.example

# Domain-anchor rule matches the domain and its subdomains.
||suffix.example^

# Exception rule excludes a matched subdomain.
@@||allow.suffix.example^

# Wildcard pattern should be translated and matched.
||ad-*.wild.example^

# Regex rule should work on the request qname.
/^metrics[0-9]+\.service\.test$/

# denyallow excludes selected names from a broad blocking rule.
||deny.example^$denyallow=sub.deny.example

# dnstype is evaluated against request qtype.
||ipv6-only.example^$dnstype=AAAA

# important exception should override important block.
||important.example^$important
@@||important.example^$important

# badfilter disables the matching blocking rule.
||disabled.example^
||disabled.example^$badfilter

# Unsupported modifiers should be ignored with a warning instead of failing init.
||rewrite.example^$dnsrewrite=1.2.3.4
